name: Milton Cardona
description: a percussionist, vocalist and conga player from Mayagüez, Puerto Rico
abstract: Milton Cardona (November 21, 1944 – September 19, 2014) was a percussionist, vocalist and conga player from Mayagüez, Puerto Rico. Milton Cardona made well over 1000 recordings, nine of which won Grammies.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots
Newport Jazz Festival: Schlitz Salute to Latin Roots

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
about_quotes.evidence: Oh I’d say just being with this band for such a long time. Bill O’Connell, Robby Ameen, Lincoln Goines and Milton Cardona.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
